category_sources: Official repository README describes Crispy Doom as a Doom source port with enhanced resolution and removed limits.
source_facts.description says Crispy Doom is a limit-removing enhanced-resolution Doom source port based on Chocolate Doom.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the display name Crispy Doom.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository provides a project wiki for documentation.
Official README is an additional official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes enhanced-resolution and limit-removing Doom engine behavior.
source_facts.description identifies a Doom source port.
